summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PropValu v2 real estate valuation platform. Backend APIs 100% successful with new v2 features working perfectly. Frontend UI operational but some network timeout issues during form navigation. AI report generation issue from iteration 1 is RESOLVED.

integration_issues.issue: Some network timeouts when navigating between form steps, though forms and map load correctly when accessible

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct PropValu branding and green institutional colors (#1B4332, #52B788, #D9ED92)
Health endpoints (200) - root and health check working
Property types API (200) - returns all 7 property types: Casa, Departamento, Terreno, Local comercial, Oficina, Bodega, Nave industrial
Stats endpoint (200) - returns valuation counts and user stats
Create valuation API (200) - supports new v2 fields: latitude, longitude, property_type
Get valuation API (200) - retrieval working with v2 data
Generate comparables API (200) - includes rental_factor data, real scraped vs simulated counts
Calculate valuation API (200) - includes market_metrics: monthly_rent_estimate, cap_rate, annual_appreciation, rental_factor_used
Generate report API (200) - AI LLM integration WORKING (previously timeout issue RESOLVED)
Form Step 1 - Location with OpenStreetMap integration visible and functional
Form Step 2 - Property types dropdown contains all 7 expected types
Form Step 4 - Photo upload grid visible (16 slots as expected)
Report page loads with complete valuation data ($5,621,168 MXN)
Market metrics visible in report: rental estimates, cap rate, confidence levels
Map embedded in PDF report correctly
Professional report design with PropValu branding
